title: neottia kamtschatica
intro: Neottia kamtschatica, also known as Kamchatka lady's tresses, is a species of flowering plant in the orchid family. It has been traditionally used in medicine for its various medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The plant is believed to offer several health benefits, such as reducing blood pressure, improving digestion, and acting as an antiseptic. In herbal preparations, Neottia kamtschatica is often used in teas, infusions, and tinctures, and can also be dried for later use in traditional medicine.
